pageContext.name: Nargacuga
pageContext.description: The Nargacuga is a large, black-furred flying wyvern, characterized by fast attacks and its stalking-like behavior! Nargacuga is a recurring monster within the Monster Hunter series, always featuring its intimidating red eyes and oppressively agile acrobatics.  Sideshow and Animegami Studios are proud to present Nargacuga PVC Figure, a chibi statue as part of the Ancient Forest Set! Its shown here, posed examining a scatter nut.
